panels.title: Memory Usage
panels.description: Tracks the total memory consumed by this Redis instance over time. Watch for steady growth approaching the configured maxmemory threshold.

panels.title: Memory Fragmentation Ratio
panels.description: Tracks the ratio of OS-allocated memory to Redis-used memory for this instance. Ratios well above 1.5 indicate significant fragmentation; values below 1.0 suggest swapping to disk.

panels.title: Evictions
panels.description: Tracks the number of keys evicted from this Redis instance due to memory limits. Any evictions mean the instance has hit its maxmemory ceiling and is discarding data.
